replies.msg: Agree

0呢d corner case就唔講啦
正常來講係咪應該揾到parabola equation先?
當required distance between poles=2p
其中一個end point就係(p,h), h係題目指定既height
咁就sub返(p,h)去揾條
y=x^2+bx既parabola, b in terms of p, h
b=h/p-p
之後d咗條式,
y'=2x+b
再equate L=\int_{-p}^p \sqrt{1+(y')^2} dx
solve for p就有答案
